scope.summary: Enforce a machine-wide flock lease and dedicated disk-backed Cargo targets for heavy multi-agent builds, including direct Cargo interception before rustc.
out_of_scope: How the external agent harness creates isolated source checkouts.
Local macOS or Windows multi-agent workspace builds; those require an isolated runner.
Protecting against an operator deliberately overriding Cargo configuration or RUSTC_WRAPPER to bypass the repository safety control.

entry_points.name: machine-wide build lease
entry_points.trace: CARGO_SWARM_BUILD_LEASE_DIR=/home/durakovic/.cache/oraclemcp-build-lease-evidence-e1 scripts/build_lease.sh --selftest ran two concurrent critical sections and proved non-overlap; both children ran exactly once.

entry_points.name: heavy-build and target preflight
entry_points.trace: scripts/check_build_lease.sh --selftest passed 8 checks: unleased workspace and cargo-mutants refusal, live-flock acceptance, spoof rejection, scoped-package allowance, CI waiver, shared-cache refusal, and tmpfs refusal.

entry_points.name: direct Cargo compiler interception
entry_points.trace: .cargo/config.toml installs scripts/cargo_build_guard.sh as build.rustc-wrapper; scripts/cargo_build_guard_test.sh asserts direct workspace Cargo exits through gate 75 before any Compiling line while scoped package iteration remains available.

entry_points.name: heavy repository entry points
entry_points.trace: scripts/resource_budget.sh and scripts/oraclemcp_feature_powerset.sh invoke scripts/check_build_lease.sh, and CI/release explicitly apply the documented single-tenant wrapper waiver on non-Linux runners.

limitations: This close does not claim a required-proof/v1 artifact; readiness remains not-ready on scoped mechanism tests.

The full direct-Cargo integration script includes a scoped Cargo compile and was not rerun in this evidence-only worktree while the serialized D2 mutation campaign held the machine-wide build lease; the no-build lease and classification self-tests were rerun at this exact source tree.
An explicit Cargo config or RUSTC_WRAPPER override can defeat any repo-local wrapper and is documented as bypassing a safety control, not as supported repository use.
